name: John Doe
history: Health condition requiring time off work for physical therapy. Past interactions with HR and a supervisor related to return-to-work and disability status.
intermediate_belief: I must perform perfectly at work to be valued.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I can't meet work expectations, I am a failure.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of confrontation and seeking validation from coworkers.
situation: Running into a coworker outside the workplace while on medical leave.
auto_thought: They must think I'm not really sick.
behavior: Avoiding eye contact and rushing away from the situation.
